positive: Stylized illustration of a whimsical forest gathering: several diverse forest animals (fox, owl, deer, raccoon) are seated comfortably around a glowing, magical campfire. The art style is modern whimsical vector illustration mixed with detailed watercolor textures, featuring strong, crisp silhouettes and limited, harmonious color palette (deep emerald, sapphire blue, burnt orange, ivory). The composition is centered and balanced, designed for apparel print. The scene must be highly contrasted with clear foreground elements against a soft, gradient backdrop. Magical elements include floating bioluminescent flora and gently falling stardust. Studio quality, high contrast, clean linework, minimal gradients, ultra detailed, vector art style, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, low quality, bad anatomy, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, artifact, excess detail, photorealistic, gradient fade, messy, noisy, jpeg artifacts, abstract
